specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running, Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition year-round. We work with boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, bringing hands-on expertise and a straightforward approach to every job that comes through our doors. Whether you're a weekend cruiser or a liveaboard, we treat your boat like it matters — because we know it does.

At Ben's Boatworks, we specialize in a comprehensive range of marine services designed to cover your vessel from the waterline down to the bilge. Our team handles professional boat surveying and inspection for pre-purchase evaluations and insurance requirements, diving and underwater services including hull cleaning and underwater repairs, marine AC and climate control system installation and maintenance, and marine plumbing and sanitation work to keep your onboard systems functioning properly. We're equipped to tackle the jobs that require real technical knowledge and the kind of attention to detail that protects your investment.

We serve boat owners throughout South Florida — from the marinas and anchorages along the Intracoastal to offshore and coastal communities within 60 miles of our base. Our clients range from private boat owners to commercial vessel operators who need reliable, knowledgeable service they can count on. At Ben's Boatworks, our commitment is simple: show up, do the work right, and make sure you leave the dock with confidence in your boat.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today!
seoKeywords: hull cleaning underwater services South Florida

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: Ben's Boatworks conducts thorough boat surveys and inspections to assess vessel condition for pre-purchase decisions, insurance documentation, and safety compliance. Our inspection process covers structural integrity, mechanical systems, and onboard equipment to give you a clear, honest picture of what you're working with.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Our diving and underwater services cover hull inspections, propeller checks, zinc replacement, and underwater repairs without the need to haul out. Keeping your running gear and hull clean and damage-free directly impacts vessel performance, fuel efficiency, and long-term hull integrity.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Ben's Boatworks installs, services, and troubleshoots marine air conditioning and climate control systems to keep your cabin comfortable in warm-weather conditions. We work on both chilled water and direct expansion systems, diagnosing refrigerant issues, seacock problems, and electrical faults that affect system performance.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: We handle marine plumbing and sanitation system repairs and installations, including holding tanks, marine heads, through-hulls, seacocks, and freshwater systems. Properly functioning sanitation systems are critical for both onboard comfort and compliance with marine environmental regulations.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full vessel condition inspection
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement dive service
Marine AC system diagnosis, repair, and seasonal maintenance
Holding tank replacement and marine sanitation system overhaul
Through-hull and seacock inspection, resealing, or replacement
Propeller and running gear inspection via underwater dive survey
Freshwater system troubleshooting and marine plumbing repair
